case_title: ORO SPANISH BROADCASTIN INC RADIO VS TOMAS JOSE INDBDA VARIETY MERCH CORP DBA GIFT CLUB et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ORO SPANISH BROADCASTIN INC             RADIO STATION KIQI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOMAS JOSE INDBDA VARIETY MERCH CORP DBA GIFT CLUB FIGUEIRA YOLANDA IDBA VARIETY MER CORPDBA GIFTCLUB $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,550.00, DEFT'S NOT PRESENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
